title: [FIRRTL] Same defname ExtModules in LowerClasses
body:
Fix illegal IR that the `LowerClasses` pass would create when lowering two
FIRRTL external modules with the same defname.  These need to map to the
same class as we don't have parametric classes.

This then exposed an issue where module ports needed to be deleted
centrally as the module-to-class mapping was no longer one to one.

Fix #9468.
